_doc: Overnight tail queue for the DEFAULT model = LoRA-rank-sweep r016 / epoch_0004.pt (448, r16), 2080 Ti, same checkpoint throughout. TWO module types share one queue, so base_args holds ONLY keys both accept (device, checkpoint, tgif2_root); everything module-specific lives in each run's args. (1) Super-res laundering (eval_laundering.py, TGIF-only): none + bicubic_x2 + bicubic_x4, kmeans, numbers-parser defaults (zoom on, otsu, 500/cell). real_esrgan_* omitted (need offline --prelaundered_root). (2) Decoder/zoom grid (eval.py) completing the 2x2 minus the already-done zoom+kmeans: full eval set = TGIF 1000/cell + FULL IMD (imd_val_split=1.0) for {nozoom+kmeans, zoom+hdbscan, nozoom+hdbscan}. eval.py uses --decoder (singular) and --zoom (store_true, omitted = off); eval_laundering uses --decoders (plural). Checkpoint: /media/ssd/runs/ablation/lora_rank_sweep/r016/epoch_0004.pt.
